calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Off Calendar

Expedited Petition To Approve: Compromise Of Pending Action (Person With A Disability)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Compromise of a Person with a disability.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Quinton Cutlip, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Denise Armstrong, mother and guardian ad litem for Anthony Frank; present in court. Anthony Frank also present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $20,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $6,667.00 payable to The Dolan Law Firm.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amoung of: $2,132.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $8,799.00
A net balance of $11,201.00 to be disbursed as follows:
$11,201.00 is to be disburse to Anthony Frank so that the money may be spent on clothing, shoes, school supplies, bedroom furniture, electronics, one or more televisions, a game console, food, allowable travel and household items for Mr. Frank's benefit. The money is only to be spent for the benefit of Anthony Frank. Gifts to others and items purchased for the benefit of others will not be allowed. Al least $1,000.00 will be set aside for Anthony, depending upon his montyly income.
Additional Orders: To enable Mr. Frank to make necessary purchases before the end of the month in which he receives the money, the settling defendant is ordered to pay all proceeds to The Dolan Law Firm and Anthony Frank within the first five (5) days of the month following the granting of this order and the complete execution of all settlement related documents.
Court signed order in open court.
